name: Meatloaf Pie Italiano
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope ground beef seasoning with onions
1/4 cup pitted ripe olives, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the seasoning mix, ground beef, and water. Form a meat "shell" in a 9-inch pie pan.
2. Mix the tomato sauce, herb seasoning, and garlic powder. Pour into the shell.
3. Sprinkle with mozzarella and Parmesan cheese.
4. Garnish with olives.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
6. Drain off excess fat before serving.
Makes 5-6 servings.
